title: Suppressing False Positives in Web Application Firewalls with Program Trace Anomaly Detection
authors: Min-Chieh Wu, Yu-Wei Liao, Yu-Sung Wu
abstract: Web Application Firewalls (WAFs) have become the standard line of defense against web security attacks in production systems. However, due to the diverse and continuously evolving nature of web applications, WAF detection rules (or models) must remain sufficiently generic to accommodate attack variants and reduce maintenance costs, resulting in a substantial number of false positives. We propose program-trace-based anomaly detection as a means to suppress the false positives. Our prototype, TraceSense, analyzes the control flow of PHP-based web applications at adjustable granularity levels to detect attacks without re lying on manually crafted rules. The evaluation based on real world Common Vulnerabilities and Exposures (CVEs) demonstrates that TraceSense can accurately identify successful at tacks—comparable to rule-based WAFs—while reliably ignoring unsuccessful attacks that would trigger false positives in conventional systems. The alerts from program-trace-based anomaly detection are inherently self-explanatory. System administrators can use the built-in visualization tool to dismiss residual false positives and investigate unknown vulnerabilities.
title_zh: 利用程序跟踪异常检测抑制Web应用防火墙误报
abstract_zh: Web应用防火墙（WAF）已成为生产系统中抵御Web安全攻击的标准防线。然而，由于Web应用的多样性和持续演进特性，WAF的检测规则（或模型）必须保持足够的通用性以应对攻击变体并降低维护成本，这导致了大量误报的产生。我们提出基于程序追踪的异常检测方法来抑制误报。我们的原型系统TraceSense能够以可调的粒度级别分析基于PHP的Web应用的控制流，从而在不依赖人工规则的情况下检测攻击。基于真实世界通用漏洞与暴露（CVE）的评估表明，TraceSense能准确识别成功攻击—其性能与基于规则的WAF相当—同时可靠地忽略那些在传统系统中会触发误报的未成功攻击。基于程序追踪的异常检测生成的告警本身具有自解释性。系统管理员可利用内置可视化工具消除残留误报并调查未知漏洞。

title: No Resource, No Benchmarks, No Problem? Evaluating and Improving LLMs for Code Generation in No-Resource Languages
authors: Alessandro Giagnorio, Alberto Martin-Lopez, Gabriele Bavota
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have significantly advanced the automation of software engineering tasks. One prominent example is code generation, where an LLM produces code in a specified programming language based on a natural language description. Most research in this area has focused on high-resource languages, such as Python or Java, which benefit from abundant training data in repository platforms like GitHub. A smaller body of work has explored low-resource languages (e.g., Lua, Racket), which are underrepresented in training corpora. In contrast, no-resource languages for which LLMs have seen virtually no training data remain largely unstudied. These languages often emerge in industry, where organizations develop proprietary or domain-specific languages unsupported by commercial tools like GitHub Copilot. This results in the need for companies to deploy their own in-house code recommenders. To investigate possible solutions in this context, we build and release three code generation benchmarks for no-resource languages, based on two recently proposed programming languages for which very little training data is available. Using these benchmarks, we experiment several solutions to teach LLMs about no-resource languages, including prompt-based techniques (e.g., few-shot) as well as pre-training and fine-tuning exploiting the little data available. While further pre-training gives the largest performance gains for no-resource languages, applying it directly to instruction-tuned models harms their ability to follow instructions. To address this, we start from a base model, further pre-training it on the target language, and then inject instruction-following capabilities via weight diff transfer from an instruction model. Such an approach significantly improves code generation capabilities in no-resource settings, allowing companies to cheaply deploy an instruct model specialized on the language of interest without dealing with the computational cost of instruction fine-tuning.
title_zh: 无资源、无基准、没问题？评估与改进零资源语言代码生成的大语言模型
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）在自动化软件工程任务领域取得了显著进展。其中一个典型例子是代码生成——LLM 能够根据自然语言描述，生成指定编程语言中的代码。该领域的大多数研究聚焦于高资源语言（如 Python 或 Java），这些语言在 GitHub 等代码仓库平台上拥有丰富的训练数据。较少数量的研究探索了低资源语言（例如 Lua、Racket），它们在训练语料库中的代表性不足。相比之下，LLM 几乎未见训练数据的无资源语言在很大程度上仍未得到研究。这类语言常出现在工业界，其中组织开发了专有语言或领域特定语言，而这些语言不受 GitHub Copilot 等商业工具支持。这导致企业需要部署内部代码推荐系统。为了探究该情境下的可行解决方案，我们基于两种近期提出且可用训练数据极少的编程语言，构建并发布了三个针对无资源语言的代码生成基准测试。利用这些基准，我们实验了多种教导 LLM 掌握无资源语言的方案，包括基于提示的技术（如少样本学习），以及利用少量可用数据进行预训练和微调。尽管进一步的预训练为无资源语言带来了最大的性能提升，但直接将其应用于指令微调模型会损害它们遵循指令的能力。为解决此问题，我们从基础模型出发，对其进一步开展目标语言的预训练，然后通过指令模型的权重差异转移来注入指令遵循能力。这种方法显著提升了无资源环境下的代码生成能力，使企业能够以较低成本部署专注于特定语言、经过指令优化的模型，而无需承担指令微调的计算成本。

title: Dual-Helix Microwave Sensor for Oil-Water Two-Phase Flow Measurement Based on Vision Transformer with Dynamic Attention
authors: Ruiqi Wang, Hanqing Chen, Yanpeng Hao, Zhiqiang Zhao, Meng Wu, Weidong Dang, Zhongke Gao
abstract: In the petroleum industry, accurate measurement of high-water-content oil-water two-phase flow parameters remains challenging due to the complex interfacial dynamics and flow pattern variations. This paper presents a novel dual-helix microwave sensor system integrated with an advanced deep learning framework for precise parameter measurement. We independently develop a dual-helix microwave sensor measurement system and conduct comprehensive vertically upward oil-water two-phase flow experiments. To address the limitations of existing methods in capturing complex temporal-spatial patterns, we propose a Vision Transformer with Dynamic Attention mechanism (ViT-DA) for soft measurement modeling. The dynamic attention module adaptively focuses on discriminative features across different temporal scales, while the multi-head self-attention mechanism captures global dependencies in microwave attenuation signals. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed ViT-DA model achieves recognition accuracies of 94.87% for total flow rate and 96.42% for water content, significantly outperforming state-of-the-art methods. The proposed approach provides an effective solution for real-time monitoring and parameter estimation in complex industrial oil-water two-phase flow systems.
title_zh: 基于动态注意力视觉Transformer的双螺旋微波传感器用于油水两相流测量
abstract_zh: 在石油工业中，由于复杂的界面动力学和流型变化，高含水油水两相流参数的精确测量仍面临挑战。本文提出了一种新型双螺旋微波传感器系统，并结合先进的深度学习框架进行精确参数测量。我们自主开发了双螺旋微波传感器测量系统，并开展了全面的垂直向上油水两相流实验。针对现有方法在捕捉复杂时空模式方面的局限性，我们提出了一种具有动态注意力机制的视觉变换器（ViT-DA）用于软测量建模。该动态注意力模块能够自适应地关注不同时间尺度上的判别性特征，同时多头自注意力机制捕捉微波衰减信号中的全局依赖关系。实验结果表明，所提出的ViT-DA模型在总流量和含水率识别上的准确率分别达到94.87%和96.42%，显著优于现有最优方法。该研究为复杂工业油水两相流系统的实时监测与参数估计提供了有效解决方案。

title: An Empirical Investigation on Source Code Comprehension Performance Between Naming and Structural Issues with and without Generative AI Assistance_supp1-3702933.pdf
abstract: Context: Software developers frequently comprehend source code with code smells that reduce readability. A previous study conducted without generative AI assistance reported that source code with naming issues required greater cognitive loads than that with structural issues. Objective: This study investigated whether accuracy and time differed when comprehending source code with naming or structural issues with and without generative AI assistance. Method: We conducted two experiments with 106 software development practitioners. In the first experiment, the subjects comprehended the source code with either naming or structural issues without generative AI assistance and answered nine questions about the source code. In the second experiment, the subjects performed the same task but with generative AI assistance. Additionally, we performed propensity score matching and compared the subjects in both experiments. Results: In the first experiment, unpaired ttest results did not show a statistically significant difference in the percentage of correct answers between naming (mean 70.5%) and structural (mean 79.8%) issues after applying Holm’s correction (adjusted p = 0.0652, p = 0.0326) and no significant difference in the comprehension time (adjusted p = 0.329, p = 0.329). In the second experiment, no significant differences in the percentage of correct answers or comprehension time between naming and structural issues were observed. In the propensity score matching comparison, 25 pairs were matched. The results of the unpaired t-test did not show a statistically significant difference in comprehension time between those without generative AI assistance (56.2 min) and those with assistance (45.1 min) when comprehending source code with naming issues (adjusted p = 0.0622, p = 0.0311). There was a significant difference in the percentage of correct answers between those without generative AI assistance (78.2%) and those with assistance (66.7%) when comprehending source code with structural issues (adjusted p = 0.0354, p = 0.0177). Conclusion: This study indicates that the effectiveness of generative AI assistance can be influenced by differences in the types of code smells in the source code and suggests why the effectiveness of generative AI assistance in source code comprehension has varied across previous studies.
title_zh: 关于有和无生成式AI辅助下命名与结构问题的源代码理解性能的实证研究_补充材料1-3702933.pdf
abstract_zh: 背景：软件开发人员在理解带有降低可读性的代码坏味的源代码时，常需耗费较多认知资源。此前一项未使用生成式人工智能辅助的研究报告指出，存在命名问题的源代码比存在结构问题的源代码需要更高的认知负荷。目标：本研究旨在探究在有无生成式人工智能辅助的情况下，理解存在命名问题或结构问题的源代码时，准确率和时间是否存在差异。方法：我们针对106名软件开发从业人员开展了两项实验。第一项实验中，受试者在无生成式人工智能辅助下理解存在命名问题或结构问题的源代码，并回答关于该源代码的九个问题。第二项实验中，受试者执行相同任务，但借助生成式人工智能辅助。此外，我们还进行了倾向得分匹配，并对两项实验中的受试者进行了比较。结果：第一项实验中，经Holm校正后（校正后p=0.0652，原p=0.0326），未配对t检验结果显示命名问题（平均正确率70.5%）与结构问题（平均正确率79.8%）的正确回答百分比无统计学显著差异；理解时间也无显著差异（校正后p=0.329，原p=0.329）。第二项实验中，命名问题与结构问题在正确回答百分比或理解时间上均未观察到显著差异。在倾向得分匹配比较中，共匹配25对。未配对t检验结果显示，在理解存在命名问题的源代码时，无生成式人工智能辅助组（平均56.2分钟）与有辅助组（平均45.1分钟）的理解时间无统计学显著差异（校正后p=0.0622，原p=0.0311）。在理解存在结构问题的源代码时，无生成式人工智能辅助组（平均正确率78.2%）与有辅助组（平均正确率66.7%）的正确回答百分比存在显著差异（校正后p=0.0354，原p=0.0177）。结论：本研究表明，生成式人工智能辅助的效果可能受到源代码中代码坏味类型差异的影响，并揭示了为何此前多项研究中生成式人工智能辅助在源代码理解方面的效果存在差异。

title: Machine Learning models for automatic classification of programming tasks in Python
authors: Ginna Viviana Leytón-Yela, Hector Mora, Jesus Insuasti, John Barco-Jimenez
publish: IEEE Revista Iberoamericana de Tecnologias del Aprendizaje
abstract: This article presents a comparative analysis of automatic error classification in Python programming tasks involving loops, with a focus on machine learning approaches for identifying error types. Three experiments were conducted: the first evaluated traditional machine learning algorithms; the second explored alternative kernel functions in SVM and MLP algorithms; and the third involved two multi-input deep learning models. Following the CRISP-DM methodology, we compiled a dataset of 3000 looped programming tasks, each including a problem description in English, a Python solution, and a classification based on state errors formulated by Gries theory (initial S, final E, state transformation T, and their combinations, totaling seven labels). In preprocessing, the code was partitioned using its AST to align it with Gries states, and both the problem descriptions and code snippets were embedded with Bert, Code-bert, and Graph-code-bert. Ablations were performed to approximate the optimal solutions for each algorithm as closely as possible. The results showed that traditional machine learning algorithms achieved up to 90% accuracy and an MCC of 83%, while alternative kernels marginally improved performance but did not surpass that of traditional algorithms. Deep learning models (ANN-GCB) achieved the best balance, with 94% accuracy and 91% MCC, respectively, demonstrating their superiority for this classification task. The model was validated with external sources from different repositories, yielding an 85% success rate, and with a group of 138 students, achieving a 96.7% correct or partially correct classification rate.
title_zh: 用于自动分类Python编程任务的机器学习模型
abstract_zh: 本文针对涉及循环的Python编程任务中的自动错误分类进行了比较分析，重点探讨了基于机器学习方法识别错误类型。共开展三项实验：第一项评估传统机器学习算法；第二项探索支持向量机（SVM）与多层感知机（MLP）算法中的替代核函数；第三项涉及两种多输入深度学习模型。遵循CRISP-DM方法论，我们构建了一个包含3000个循环编程任务的数据集，每个任务包括英文问题描述、Python解决方案及基于Gries理论（初始状态S、终止状态E、状态转换T及其组合，共七类标签）的状态错误分类。预处理阶段，利用代码的抽象语法树（AST）进行分区以对齐Gries状态，并通过Bert、Code-bert和Graph-code-bert分别对问题描述和代码片段进行嵌入。通过消融实验尽可能逼近每种算法的最优解。结果表明：传统机器学习算法准确率最高达90%，马修斯相关系数（MCC）达83%；替代核函数虽略提升性能，但未超越传统算法；深度学习模型（ANN-GCB）取得最佳平衡，准确率与MCC分别达94%和91%，证明了其在分类任务中的优越性。模型经外部来源（不同代码仓库）验证，成功率达85%；并在138名学生群体中测试，获得96.7%的正确或部分正确分类率。

title: ICE: Reducing Search Space for Error-inducing Input Detection
authors: Youshuai Tan, Zhanwei Zhang, Zishuo Ding, Jinfu Chen, Weiyi Shang
abstract: Floating-point programs play a crucial role in scientific and engineering applications as well as daily life. Due to the inherent inaccuracies of floating-point arithmetic, these programs are susceptible to errors. While only a small subset of possible inputs may lead to significant inaccuracies in the program’s final results, such errors can have serious consequences. Prior approaches have been developed to identify error-inducing inputs using search algorithms. However, the task is challenging due to the sparsity of the search space. Furthermore, these tools frequently depend on high-precision programs as oracles for computing floating-point errors. This reliance introduces additional challenges, including prolonged execution times and instability. To detect these inputs more effectively and efficiently, we propose a simple yet effective method called ICE, designed to generate reduced and erroneous domains for these approaches. ICE first calculates the errors of the target program by taking all half-precision floating-point numbers as inputs. Instead of calculating errors based on high-precision programs, ICE injects small perturbations into each atomic operation of the program and measures the difference between the perturbed and original results to estimate floating-point errors. Subsequently, ICE selects the numbers with errors in the top n% as the endpoints of the important ranges. These individual ranges, which form domains, can then be used to improve existing tools by reducing the search space. To evaluate ICE, we apply ICE with three state-of-the-art error-inducing input detection approaches, i.e., ATOMU, HSED, and FPCC. Experimental results demonstrate that ICE could improve the performance of existing approaches by effectively reducing the search space, detecting more error-inducing inputs, and significantly shortening the search time.
title_zh: ICE：为错误诱导输入检测缩减搜索空间
abstract_zh: 浮点程序在科学工程应用及日常生活中扮演着关键角色。由于浮点运算固有的不精确性，这些程序容易产生误差。尽管只有少量可能的输入会导致程序最终结果出现显著误差，但此类错误可能造成严重后果。此前已有研究通过搜索算法识别误差诱导输入，但由于搜索空间的稀疏性，这一任务极具挑战性。此外，这些工具通常依赖高精度程序作为计算浮点误差的参照标准，这种依赖性带来了执行时间过长和不稳定等额外问题。为更高效地检测此类输入，我们提出了一种名为ICE的简单有效方法，旨在为现有方法生成精简且包含误差的输入域。ICE首先以所有半精度浮点数为输入计算目标程序的误差。与基于高精度程序计算误差的方法不同，ICE通过对程序的每个原子操作注入微小扰动，并测量扰动结果与原始结果的差异来估计浮点误差。随后，ICE选取误差排名前n%的数值作为关键区间的端点。这些独立区间构成的输入域可通过缩小搜索空间来改进现有工具。为评估ICE，我们将其与三种最先进的误差诱导输入检测方法（ATOMU、HSED和FPCC）结合使用。实验结果表明，ICE能有效缩小搜索空间、检测更多误差诱导输入并显著缩短搜索时间，从而提升现有方法的性能。

title: From Data Governance to Contract-Constrained AI Systems: Architecture and Evaluation for Enterprise NL-to-SQL with AI-Ready Data Models
publish: Proceedings of the 14th International Conference on Advances in Information Technology
title_zh: 从数据治理到合同约束的AI系统：面向企业NL-to-SQL的架构与评估——基于AI就绪的数据模型
